title: Mob Talisman
description: This mod adds 48 powerful talisman that can give you the powers from several mobs.
body:
This mod adds new talismans that grant various powers from different mobs.

# Features
### Talismans
There are currently 48 unique talismans in the mod. Each one can be dropped by its corresponding mob.

Here are a few examples of the more notable talismans. You can view all the talismans in the gallery. However keep in mind that some talismans have cooldowns that are not listed in the gallery.

![Breeze Talisman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9aa93426a373b7ec4a06547a26eabffa7b380e36_0.webp)
_This talisman gives you a windcharge boost when pressing a certain key._

![Creeper Talisman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d41540f75bf79232465d6ccaf4086d2b0ce9847f_0.webp)
_This talisman makes it so that Creepers fear players and no longer explode._

![Shulker Talisman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ae9d9eaa19bc04ea50f44480ea769c5112dfe3f_0.webp)
_This talisman gives you the ability to open Shulker Boxes from your hotbar without the need to place them._

### Advancements
There are currently 9 Advancements in the mod.
<details>
<summary>Advancement list</summary>

1. Into Talisman - Obtain a talisman
2. Collector - Obtain every single talisman
3. I think a spider bit me - Sprint against a wall using the Spider Talisman
4. Definitely skill-based - Get a random item while using the Wither Talisman
5. Villager's Touch - Kill a mob while using the Villager Talisman
6. Home Sweet Home - Teleport back to your saved position using the Enderman Talisman
7. The tables have turned - Make a creeper run away from you using the Creeper Talisman
8. Ruminant - Eat grass by using the Sheep Talisman
9. Infinite Power - Reach Strength X by using the Ravager Talisman

</details>

### Configuration
You can configure the drop chance for each talisman individually. Therefore you can freely decide which talismans should be disabled.

There are also 100+ configuration options for nearly every other value used in the mod. If you're still missing a configuration option, feel free to contact me on Discord (see below).

Note that when playing in singleplayer, you need to rejoin the world for the config changes to take effect. In multiplayer, you need to restart the server.

# Translations
This mod has currently a translation for the following languages:
- English
- German

If you want to contribute any other language please contact me on Discord (see below).

# Dependencies
This mod requires the following other mods as dependencies:
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)
- [Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api)
- [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories)

Although it is not required, [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is highly recommended.

# Support
If you have questions, encounter problems, find bugs or have suggestions you can join my discord server:

[![Fneifnox's Mods Discord Server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d65d0cb3b474c0517d6d0e11b8f77c2276edf08f.png)](https://discord.gg/bszSDCq5ms)
